parameters.query: INSERT INTO gastos (phone_number, monto, categoria, descripcion) VALUES ('{{ $json.phone_number }}', {{ $json.monto }}, '{{ $json.categoria }}', NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $json.descripcion }}', ''), 'null')) RETURNING id

SELECT (SELECT monto_limite FROM presupuestos WHERE phone_number = '{{ $('Execute Sub-workflow Trigger').item.json.phone_number }}' AND categoria = '{{ $('Execute Sub-workflow Trigger').item.json.categoria }}') AS monto_limite, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(monto), 0) FROM gastos WHERE phone_number = '{{ $('Execute Sub-workflow Trigger').item.json.phone_number }}' AND categoria = '{{ $('Execute Sub-workflow Trigger').item.json.categoria }}' AND DATE_TRUNC('month', fecha) = DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW())) AS gastado
